description: Finding relevant items in a represented search space
review_question: Who defines relevance and what is excluded?

description: Assigning categories or numerical scores to cases
review_question: What categories and thresholds structure power?
What values shape attention and priority?

description: Selecting actions under objectives and constraints
review_question: What is optimized and what is sacrificed?

description: Using formal models to explain or simulate phenomena
review_question: Where do model scope and evidence limit interpretation?
What authority is delegated and how can people appeal?

description: Producing text/code/media outputs from learned models
review_question: What kind of output is this and how should it be reviewed?

description: Allowing systems to call tools or act across workflows
review_question: What boundaries permissions and audit trails govern action?
